product: Genie SQL improvements, API enhancements, and bug fixes
tagline: Upgraded large language models (LLMs): The LLMs used by Genie to author SQL have been upgraded for improved accuracy and performance.
what_it_does: Upgraded large language models (LLMs): The LLMs used by Genie to author SQL have been upgraded for improved accuracy and performance. SQL autocomplete: Autocomplete is now available when editing Genie SQL to help users write queries more efficiently. Feedback API endpoints: Thumbs up and thumbs down feedback API endpoints are now available for collecting user feedback on Genie responses.
why_it_matters: Upgraded large language models (LLMs): The LLMs used by Genie to author SQL have been upgraded for improved accuracy and performance.
plain_summary: Upgraded large language models (LLMs): The LLMs used by Genie to author SQL have been upgraded for improved accuracy and performance. SQL autocomplete: Autocomplete is now available when editing Genie SQL to help users write queries more efficiently.
key_takeaway: Upgraded large language models (LLMs): The LLMs used by Genie to author SQL have been upgraded for improved accuracy and performance.
